# API Checklist: Enter Street Address to Estimate Property Value

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK002 Are error response fields specified for next-step guidance and retry information? [Completeness, Spec §Exception / Error Flows] Note: Necessary; /prompts:speckit.plan reran to meet.

- [x] CHK005 Is the canonical location ID requirement expressed with sufficient precision for API consumers? [Clarity, Spec §Functional Requirements]

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK006 Do the API requirements align with UI flow requirements for validation, geocoding failure, and partial data warnings? [Consistency, Spec §Functional Requirements, Spec §Alternate Flows, Spec §Exception / Error Flows] Note: Necessary; /prompts:speckit.plan reran to meet.

## Scenario Coverage

- [x] CHK007 Are requirements defined for API behavior when the use case ends in failure (no estimate, reason provided)? [Coverage, Spec §Exception / Error Flows] Note: Necessary; /prompts:speckit.plan reran to meet.
- [x] CHK008 Are requirements defined for API behavior when geocoding is unavailable versus no match? [Coverage, Spec §Exception / Error Flows] Note: Necessary; /prompts:speckit.plan reran to meet.

# UX Checklist: Enter Street Address to Estimate Property Value

# Security Checklist: Use assessment baseline

**Purpose**: Validate input handling, error safety, and traceability for baseline-anchored estimates.
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: `specs/016-assessment-baseline/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

## Input Handling

- [x] CHK-SEC-001 Location input is validated and normalized before lookup.
- [x] CHK-SEC-002 Deterministic selection logic avoids nondeterministic output for the same input.

- [x] CHK-SEC-004 Partial feature outages are surfaced without crashing the response path.

## Traceability & Logging

- [x] CHK-SEC-006 Guardrail application is flagged to prevent misleading high-confidence output.

# UX Checklist: Use assessment baseline

- [x] CHK-UX-008 Guardrail application shows low-confidence or equivalent indicator.

**Feature**: `specs/023-property-estimate-api/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

- [x] CHK-SEC-001 Unauthenticated requests return HTTP 401 with structured error.
- [x] CHK-SEC-002 Unauthorized requests return HTTP 403 with missing scope/role.

- [x] CHK-SEC-003 Error responses never expose internal stack traces.
- [x] CHK-SEC-004 Timeouts return HTTP 503 with correlation ID.
